concerns.detail: Detailed lab-specific descriptors about individual students (transfer to NLP group, reapplication to PhD, performance issues) sufficient to de-anonymize private individuals within the academic community
concerns.excerpt: 他进组啥都不会，老师给系里说了多少好话，才帮他转到同校的NLP组

concerns.detail: Insulting characterization using '普信' (delusional/overconfident ordinary person) and dehumanizing term 'jiao'c'
Ageist slur '老登' (old fart/gaffer) used as unsupported personal attack
